---
title: "Humboldt County Regional Cost and Operational Assessment" 
number: 1
image: /images/humboldt.jpg
image-alt: "Image of Humboldt County, Oregon"
---
{{< include _return-to-pf.qmd >}}

::: {.article}
![](/images/humboldt.jpg){.left-img}

The cities and Humboldt County contracted with Bell & Associates to assess Recology’s waste collection operations, evaluate the cost of collection services for each jurisdiction, establish cost of service collection rates, assist with updating the franchise contracts and updating the methods for annual rate adjustments, and determine the cost and rate impacts of implementing SB 1383, California’s organic collection law.

Thumbnail image attribution:
[Bdonjc - Own work, CC BY-SA 4.0](https://commons.wikimedia.org/w/index.php?curid=112642181)
:::
